single_cartridge_mode_65553.body:
The indicated cartridge appears to be missing. Touch "OK" to print with only the other cartridge. 
Printing in this mode may be slower and printed colors may look different than intended.
If both cartridges are present, check that the plastic tape has been removed.

hp_cartridges_installed_65554.body: The indicated cartridges are Original HP cartridges that were previously installed.

cartridges_low_65557.body:
The indicated cartridges are low. These cartridges do not have to be replaced now.

You might want to have replacements available to install when print quality is no longer acceptable.

hp_instant_ink_cartridges_65766.body: Thank you for installing your HP Instant Ink Cartridges. You can find info on how to recycle at HP Instant Ink  <https://www.hpinstantink.com/>. Don't forget to recycle your used cartridges.

single_cartridge_mode_65771.body:
The indicated cartridge appears to be missing. Touch "OK" to print with only the other cartridge. 
Printing in this mode may be slower and printed colors may look different than intended.
If both cartridges are present, check that the plastic tape has been removed. 
For problems with cartridges obtained from HP Instant Ink, please contact HP Instant Ink Support.

non_instant_ink_cartridges_installed_657.body:
The cartridges you inserted are not monitored by your HP Instant Ink service, so you will not be shipped replacement cartridges. If monthly billing has begun for your HP Instant Ink service, it will continue. 

Please replace these cartridges with HP Instant Ink cartridges.

Since your printer is enrolled in HP Instant Ink, you should have a replacement cartridge available or a delivery coming soon. If you don't think you received an ink shipment, check around your workspace--it might have arrived some time before you needed it. If you still have trouble locating your ink, sign in to your account at InstantInk.com for information on your ink shipments.

single_cartridge_mode_66263.body:
The indicated cartridge appears to be missing. Tap "OK" to print with the other cartridge.If both cartridges are present, check that the plastic tape has been removed.

If you have an HP+ printer, it requires Original HP cartridges.If your printer is enrolled in HP Instant Ink, and you don't have a replacement cartridge, contact HP Instant Ink support.

altered_or_cloned_cartridges_installed_6.body:
The printer has detected that a non-HP chip is attached to the indicated cartridges.

NOTE: Any printer repair required from using these supplies is not covered under warranty, and supply status may not be available

If you believe you purchased genuine HP cartridges, visit the HP Anti-Counterfeit website (www.hp.com/go/anticounterfeit) for more information or to report fraud.

hp_instant_ink_65851.body: Thank you for installing HP Instant Ink Ready cartridges. Visit www.hpinstantink.com to learn more and enroll in HP Instant Ink.

cartridges_low_30000.body:
The indicated cartridge is low. Actual cartridge life remaining may vary. Consider having a replacement available to install when print quality is no longer acceptable. The cartridge does not need to be replaced now.

When you are ready to remove your cartridge, you can find information on how to recycle it at www.hp.com/recycle.

ids_delayed_backto_hp_66516.body:
Original HP cartridges successfully installed.

The printer is recovering from Safe Mode. It will continue to operate in Safe Mode until the previous ink has been flushed out.

hp_cartridges_installed_66101.body: Thank you for installing Original HP cartridges.
